name: Text & Chat AI
description: Conversational AI assistants for writing, research, analysis, and general-purpose tasks

name: Image Generation
description: AI tools that create images from text prompts or modify existing images

name: Video Generation
description: AI tools that generate or edit video content from text, images, or other video

name: Audio & Music
description: AI tools for generating music, voice, sound effects, and audio editing

name: Coding Assistants
description: AI-powered tools for writing, reviewing, and debugging code

name: Productivity & Notes
description: AI tools for note-taking, document management, meeting transcription, and workflow organization

name: 3D & CAD / Specialized
description: AI for 3D modeling, CAD, electronic design, reverse engineering, and other specialized fields

name: All-in-One Platforms
description: Platforms offering unified access to multiple AI models or spanning multiple categories

name: Workflow & Automation
description: Tools that connect AI services together and automate multi-step workflows

name: AI Agents & Autonomous
description: Autonomous AI agents that browse, code, research, and complete multi-step tasks independently

name: Local & Open Source AI
description: AI models and tools that run locally on your hardware, preserving privacy and avoiding API costs

name: AI Security & Trust
description: Tools for securing AI systems, detecting AI-generated content, monitoring model safety, and auditing AI behavior

name: Speech & Voice AI
description: AI tools for speech-to-text, text-to-speech, voice cloning, real-time translation, and voice assistants

name: Data Analysis & Research
description: AI tools for analyzing data, generating insights, research assistance, and scientific discovery

name: Robotics & Embodied AI
description: AI tools for robotics development: simulation, robot learning, drones/UAVs, humanoids, IoT/edge AI, ROS ecosystem, computer vision, industrial automation, and embodied AI foundation models
